articles.title: 고물수집 노인 치고 "돌인 줄 알았다"…도주치사 혐의 40대 송치
articles.summary: 박영민 기자 = 경남 창원서부경찰서는 자전거로 고물을 수집하던 노인을 차로 치어 숨지게 한 뒤 현장을 벗어난 혐의(특정범죄가중...

articles.title: 토요일 오전 전국 대부분 강풍 속 봄비…낮 최고 13∼21도
articles.summary: 권지현 기자 = 토요일인 4일 낮까지는 전국 대부분 지역에 비가 오겠다. 강원내륙·산지와 충북 지역은 늦은 오후까지도 이어지는...

articles.title: 대낮 만취 운전하다 주차 차량 들이받고 이탈 60대, 징역형 집유
articles.summary: 정종호 기자 = 대낮에 술에 취해 운전하다 주차된 차량 2대를 들이받고, 현장을 이탈한 60대가 징역형의 집행유예를 선고받았다...

articles.title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI
articles.summary: OpenAI announced a massive new funding round aimed at scaling the next phase of AI development, reinforcing demand for frontier-model infrastructure, products, and distribution.

articles.title: Anthropic leaked 500,000 lines of its own source code
articles.summary: A leak tied to Claude Code exposed a large chunk of Anthropic internal code, turning AI coding-agent security and privacy practices into the week's biggest Claude-related story.

articles.title: Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model
articles.summary: Anthropic published new interpretability research claiming it can trace how emotion-related concepts function inside a large language model, adding to the push for more inspectable frontier AI.

articles.title: California signs first-of-its-kind executive order to strengthen AI protections and responsible use
articles.summary: Governor Gavin Newsom signed a new executive order focused on AI protections and responsible deployment, signaling that U.S. state-level regulation is moving from principles into operating rules.

articles.title: HHS aligns health technology leadership for an AI-enabled health care system
articles.summary: The U.S. Department of Health and Human Services said it is reorganizing health-tech leadership around data liquidity, affordability, and AI-enabled care, showing AI policy is now directly shaping public-sector infrastructure.
